title: Assistant Store Manager - Star Bazaar - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Star Bazaar - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Bazaar! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
